guide.zcoffeecraft2.page1:
Welcome to The Coffee Guide!
 
This book will teach you how to make
coffee with Zusz's CoffeeCraft2!
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page2:
-Table of Contents 2

-Coffee & Beans 3-8
   -Strength & Length 4
   -Arabica 5
   -Robusta 6
   -Liberica 7
   -Excelsa 8

-Extra Ingredients 9

-Hot Chocolate 10

-Machines 11
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page3:
The first step to making coffee is the 
beans, either §3Arabica §0or §3Robusta
§0
Coffee plants are very similar to sweet 
berry bushes. §3They grow in 8 stages,§0 
of which §3stages 7&8 can be harvested.§0
Stage 8 provides more beans than 
stage 7. After harvesting, the bushes 
return to stage 6.
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page4:
Strength depends only on the type of
beans used. Stronger beans give a
shorter duration. 

Length depends on the type of beans
used and the roast of the beans.
More powerful beans give a shorter
duration, while weaker ones last longer.

Length can be increased by roasting 
beans, but this also introduces a 
delay that increases with the roast:

§6-Light roast: no delay
§c-Medium roast: 10 seconds of delay
§4-Dark roast: 25 seconds of delay

§0The amount of time added depends on
the bean type.
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page5:
Where to find?

-§3Arabica §0Coffee Bushes are found in 
§aPlains §0and §aJungle §0Biomes

§0Provides:

-§64§0/§c5§0/§46 §0minutes of level §11 §0effect
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page6:
Where to find?

-§3Robusta §0Coffee Bushes are found in 
§9Taigas§0, §9Old Growth Pine Taigas§0 and 
§9Old Growth Spruce Taigas

§0Provides:

-§63§0/§c4§0/§45 §0minutes of level §12 §0effect
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page7:
Where to find?

-§3Liberica §0Coffee Bushes are found in 
§6Savannas§0, §6Windswept Savannas§0 and 
§6Savanna Plateaus

§0Provides:

-§62,5§0/§c3,5§0/§44,5 §0minutes of level §11 §0effect
-§41§0 minute of level §11§0 secondary effect
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page8:
Where to find?

-§3Excelsa §0Coffee Bushes are found in 
§aJungle§0, §aBamboo Jungle§0 and 
§aSparse Jungle§0 biomes

Provides:

-§64,5§0/§c5,5§0/§46,5§0 minutes of level §11§0 effect
-level §11 §4instant damage§0

Excelsa is an exceptionally strong
coffee, giving the best effects but
also having a negative one
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page9:
Adding extra ingredient(s) to your
coffee can either change or extend
the effect, depending on the
ingredient(s) used.
§7(Recipes can be seen in JEI)

§0Some vanilla items can be used as
ingredients, along with some added by
the mod. The mod's ingredients are:

§3-Whipped cream
§3(Whisk+Sugar+Milk)

§1-Steamed Milk
§1(Heating Milk)

§5-Milk Foam
§5(Steamed Milk+Sugar+Whisk)
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page10:
Hot Chocolate is brewed without ground
coffee, using cocoa beans

Provides:

-Level §11§0/§92§0 Instant Health
guide.zcoffeecraft2.page11:
-The Coffee Grinder grinds coffee
beans into their ground variants with
a 16 -> 1 ratio

-The Coffee Machine makes coffee 
from ground coffee, water, a cup and 
optionally extra ingredients. 
The places of items are indicated in the 
GUI. Empty spaces are for extra 
ingredients!

§7(Recipes for both can be seen in JEI)
